creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
Also, it looks like test_write_disk_secure744 is failing to clean up after itself, which is causing kyua grief when cleaning up the directory contents (

lib/libarchive/functional_test:test_write_disk_secure744  ->  broken: Caught unexpected exception: Tester failed with code 2; this is a bug  [2.429s]

->

Executing command [ /usr/tests/lib/libarchive/libarchive_test -d -r /usr/tests/lib/libarchive -v test_write_disk_secure744 ]
Fail: program did not exit cleanly
stdout:

If tests fail or crash, details will be in:
   /tmp/kyua.atf-tester.aHFvix/libarchive_test.2016-08-15T17.38.04-000

Reference files will be read from: /usr/tests/lib/libarchive
Exercising: libarchive 3.2.1 zlib/1.2.8 liblzma/5.2.2 bz2lib/1.0.6
379: test_write_disk_secure744
/usr/src/svn/contrib/libarchive/libarchive/test/test_write_disk_secure744.c:88: ARCHIVE_FAILED != t
   Description: Attempt to create target11 via 1119-character symlink should have failed

stderr:
 *** forcing core dump so failure can be debugged ***
